memory.summary: The strong odor from my roommate's unwashed clothes is disrupting my focus and contributing to my fatigue, making relocating to the library a necessary step to restore my ability to work.

Relocating to the library restored my focus, but it only solves the immediate work environment. The root cause remains unaddressed, meaning tonight's sleep disruption and accumulated debt will persist unless I raise the issue.
